tools.name: threat_landscape
tools.description: Current cyber threat landscape overview per ENISA categories. Top 8 threats with sector relevance and mitigations.

tools.name: cve_risk_score
tools.description: CVE risk prioritization combining CVSS, EPSS, KEV catalog, exploit availability. Returns weighted priority score with patching SLA.

tools.name: attack_surface_check
tools.description: Attack surface assessment checklist. Web apps, remote access, cloud, IoT, email. Prioritized security checks.

tools.name: phishing_indicators
tools.description: Analyze email/URL for phishing indicators. Scores sender, urgency, attachments, URL patterns. Returns verdict and recommended actions.

tools.name: nis2_compliance
tools.description: NIS2 Directive (EU 2022/2555) compliance assessment. All 10 Art. 21 measures, entity classification, penalties, incident reporting.

tools.name: nis2_incident_report
tools.description: NIS2 incident notification template. 24h early warning, 72h notification, 1-month final report templates.

tools.name: iso27001_gap
tools.description: ISO 27001:2022 Annex A gap analysis. All 93 controls across 4 themes, new 2022 controls highlighted, certification process.

tools.name: dora_ict_risk
tools.description: DORA Art. 5-12 ICT risk management compliance check. 8 articles assessed with specific requirements per article.

tools.name: password_policy
tools.description: Generate password policy per NIST SP 800-63B (2024) and BSI recommendations. Modern best practices — no forced rotation.

tools.name: incident_playbook
tools.description: Incident response playbook for ransomware, data breach, phishing compromise. Phase-by-phase actions with legal obligations.

tools.name: risk_matrix
tools.description: Risk assessment matrix (likelihood × impact). ISO 31000/27005 methodology. Provide risks for assessment or get template.

tools.name: security_metrics
tools.description: Security KPI/metrics dashboard template. MTTD, MTTR, patch compliance, phishing rate. Board-ready reporting guidance.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "password_policy" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate password policy per NIST SP 800-63B (2024) and BSI recommendations. Modern best practices — no forced rotation.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: attack_surface_check · Private data: password_policy · Public sink: attack_surface_check, phishing_indicators.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: attack_surface_check · Private data: password_policy · Public sink: attack_surface_check, phishing_indicators

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
